message:
test(fcp-core): Add comprehensive exactly-once semantics tests (57x7)

Add 40+ unit tests covering all aspects of exactly-once semantics:

Golden Vector Tests:
- Deterministic signable_bytes for OperationIntent and OperationReceipt
- Domain separator verification (FCP2-INTENT-V1, FCP2-RECEIPT-V1)
- JSON roundtrip serialization

Idempotency Key Tests:
- Different keys produce independent entries
- Key collision resistance
- Expiry semantics (before/at/after boundary)
- Full lifecycle simulation (pending → in_progress → completed)

Lease Fencing Tests:
- Intent binds to lease_seq
- Stale lease holder detection
- Safe operations without lease binding
- Signable bytes include/differ with lease_seq

Fault Injection Tests:
- Crash detection between intent and receipt
- Recovery with receipt present
- Threshold boundary behavior
- Timestamp overflow handling (saturating_sub)
- Incomplete intent reconciliation

Concurrency Tests:
- Same key single execution check
- Different keys independent execution
- Race between intent and lease expiry

Also adds validation error display tests, safety tier requirements
tests, and edge cases (empty/long keys, many objects, upstream
idempotency).

All 66 operation tests pass with zero clippy warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
